fields.description: category of the unit(s) on the contract.

fields.description: Search for rental contracts by selecting a contract type from the drop down list.

fields.name: Contract Number
fields.description: The rental contract number. Hover over the Contract number for the context menu to appear.

fields.name: Stock Number /
fields.description: The rental unit stock number. Stock Numbers with reverse highlight VESign Status indicate that the stock number's profile has memos attached to it.
